| Command         | Description                | Example                |
|-----------------|----------------------------|------------------------|
| `cat`           | Show file contents         | `cat file \| head`     |
| `grep`          | Search pattern             | `grep "foo" file \| wc -l` |
| `pipe` example  | Escape a pipe \| in a cell | This \| That           |
| `sort`          | Sort lines                 | `sort file \| uniq`    |
